visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair sits at a white desk, wearing a cream-colored crochet tank top with embroidered flowers. She is carefully adjusting a silver and black high-tech VR headset (Apple Vision Pro) onto her head. A person on the left, whose arms are visible, helps her position the device. On the desk, a tablet displays a home screen and a gaming controller sits nearby. The environment appears to be a brightly lit indoor studio or tech showroom. (2) Once the headset is on, the woman smiles brightly and begins waving both hands in front of her face as if interacting with a virtual environment. Her movements are exploratory and enthusiastic. The lighting remains consistent, highlighting the metallic finish of the headset and the texture of her clothing. (3) She continues her hand interactions, using pointing gestures with her index fingers. A man's hands enter the frame from the side, gesturing while he speaks to her, though he remains mostly off-camera. The camera stays static at a medium shot, capturing her upper body and the tabletop clearly throughout the sequence.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character, 1 person helping on the left, 1 person partially visible in background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a cream-colored crochet top with floral embroidery and denim jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, bright indoor space with a white desk. A tablet and a game controller are on the desk. Other people are visible in the background, suggesting a tech event or office.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks in enthusiastic Mandarin, explaining the setup of a device. The tone is cheerful and high-arousal. In the background, there is a steady hum of a crowded room with distant chatter and the faint sound of objects being moved. No music is playing. (2) The woman exclaims 'Hi!' and mentions 'Travel Mode.' A male voice responds with short, affirmative laughs ('Hey hey hey'), creating a lively, conversational atmosphere. Short percussive sounds from the headset's physical adjustments are briefly audible over the speech. (3) The conversation continues with the female and male discussing the features of the virtual environment. Their speech is rapid but clear, indicating high engagement. The ambient noise of the room remains at a consistent, low-intensity level throughout.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To demonstrate the user experience and specific 'Travel Mode' feature of the Apple Vision Pro headset in a hands-on tech preview setting.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Positive first-hand experience and demonstration of a specific brand-name product.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A standard tech product demonstration video focusing on user reaction and feature functionality.
